name: E-8 standardized rule metadata: fixable values outside {code, whitespace, null} are rejected per the §2.1 enum
command:
printf 'id: g-ts-303
type: problem
fixable: yes-please
' > g-ts-303.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/rule-metadata-complete.sh" g-ts-303.yaml 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 2 ] && grep -q 'fixable: "yes-please" not in enum {code, whitespace, null}' err.txt && echo fixable_enum 1>&2
